content:
### Step 7: Fix all compile errors from config changes
### Step 8: Verify full workspace compiles

### Step 9: Run all tests

Run: `cargo test -p corvia-common -- --test-threads=1`
Expected: ALL PASS


### Step 10: Commit

```bash
git add crates/corvia-common/src/config.rs crates/corvia-kernel/src/traits.rs \
    crates/corvia-kernel/src/knowledge_store.rs crates/corvia-cli/src/main.rs \
    tests/integration/e2e_test.rs
git commit -m "feat(config): add StoreType and InferenceProvider for two-tier storage (D35)"
```

---
